title: gun.c jpt_80054084 shooting-dispatch mis-groupings: ROCKETLAUNCH/REMOTEMINE/PLASTIQUE diverge from retail
repro: audit: asm_audit.py entry handle_weapon_id_values_possibly_1st_person_animation (rank 1); diff jpt_80054084[weapon_id-2] vs switch(weapon_id-2)

history.note: ASM authority jpt_80054084 (gun.c:19579, dispatch gun.c:20144-20154 idx=weapon_id-2) vs live C switch(weapon_id-2) (gun.c:18247). Three residual mis-groupings after TRIGGER/TANKSHELLS/M16/FNP90 fixes: idx23 ROCKETLAUNCH ASM=pistol but C=default(throwable); idx27 REMOTEMINE ASM=throwable but C=pistol; idx32 PLASTIQUE ASM=throwable but C=pistol. Player-visibility (reachability under state==2 + ammo guard) to be root-caused. Found by S-tier Task 2.4 ASM-audit pilot #1.
